productDisplayName: Skechers Women White and Pink Shoe
description: Designed to create a more fluid stride, the skechers Ladies Sports shoe is engineered with Kinetic Wedge technology to ensure a more natural runing state. This reduces injuries and enhances performance, while the ultra light outsole takes the beating while you enjoy those refreshing training moments.Upper Mesh upper with synthetic and fibre overlays for ample breathability and lightweight comfort Heavily padded mesh tongue for snug and comfort Fit Knit laces across the centre for snug fit Rubber outsole extended till the toe box and stitched for enhnaced durability and comfort Padded collar to keep the ankle locked in place and safe from twisting Midsole EVA injected phylon midsole for lightweight comfort 1.5 inch midsole at centre point to increase postural muscle activation by 85%, gluteus muscle activation by 71% and calf muscle activation by 68% Arched and soft footbed for ergonomic fit Removable adaptive comfort ride cushioned insole that can accommodate an orthotic Outsole Made of high abrasion-resistant ultra light rubber Carbon rubber outsole with horizontal wave grooves on the forefoot and heel along with protruding lugs on the periphery Shank connecting forefoot to the heel providing ergonomic support to the inner arch Kinetic Wedge to maximize workout Wash care Rub surface with a soft, damp cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash
